title: Poison Immunity
description: A simple mod that adds a way to be immune to the poison and withering effect!
body:
# Poison Immunity
![Mod Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/183bd0da3ec029e1324cadcd29309c36eb7eeef7.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qMwD3TElXQw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Poison Immunity Mod adds a simple way to be immune to poison and withering effects
- Equinitinium Ore is a new ore that is very common to find, onced mined will effect the nearest player with poison.
- Raw Equinitinum is the item thats dropped by Equinitinum Ore, can be smelted in a blast furnace for 1 minute to make Equinitinum.
- Equinitinium is an item that can be crafted to Equinitinium Powder with a specific recipe.
- Equinitinium Powder is an item that can be brewed into Poison Immunity Potion. **_NEVER_** eat Equinitinum Powder!
- Poison Immunity Potion is a new potion (and effect) that makes the player (or entity) immune to poison and withering effects.

## Technical Information
- ModID: poison_immunity
- Latest Version: 1.0.0 Release
- Available Minecraft Versions: 1.20.1
- Available on: Forge
- Made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)
- Do not redistribute this Mod without proper permission from KittyVoyager (ALL RIGHTS RESERVED)
